## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

List the commands and manual checks you ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and intentionally limited.
- [ ] Docs were updated if install steps, behavior, or requirements changed.
- [ ] `bash -n install.sh` passes locally.
- [ ] The plugin builds with CMake.
- [ ] Manual verification steps are included for runtime or UI changes.
